name: landrop-clip
description: LanDrop Clip local-only sharing MVP for Mac and Android on the same LAN.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,extension -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w extension"
scripts.receiver:dev: concurrently -n shared,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev:receiver -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w extension
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w desktop
scripts.release:extension: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w extension && npm run package -w extension
scripts.receiver: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run receiver -w server
